items.text: COM component defines internal state variable Mode
items.fragment: COM component defines internal state variable Mode
items.requirement_fragment: COM component defines internal state variable Mode

items.text: Value of Mode is calculated based on control panel signals received on Panel input port
items.fragment: Value of Mode is calculated based on control panel signals received on Panel input port
items.requirement_fragment: Value of Mode is calculated based on control panel signals received on Panel input port

items.text: CMD output value is strictly equal to theoretical brake command computed from current brake mode (Mode) and pedal pressure value received on Pedal input port
items.fragment: CMD output value is strictly equal to theoretical brake command computed from current brake mode (Mode) and pedal pressure value received on Pedal input port
items.requirement_fragment: CMD output value is strictly equal to theoretical brake command computed from current brake mode (Mode) and pedal pressure value received on Pedal input port
